title: Generate a React Cloudflare Workers Application
description: Scaffolds a React + Vite + TanStack Router SPA deployed on Cloudflare Workers

description.description: Short human-readable description of the application

projectName.description: Project name used to namespace all resources — must match TF_VAR_project_name (e.g. falcon)

stagingDomain.description: Custom domain for the staging environment (e.g. staging.example.com). Leave blank to skip.
stagingDomain.x-prompt: Staging custom domain? (leave blank to skip)

productionDomain.description: Custom domain for the production environment (e.g. example.com). Leave blank to skip.
productionDomain.x-prompt: Production custom domain? (leave blank to skip)
